# Rosalind Problem: Counting Point Mutations (Forth Solution)

## Problem Description
Given two DNA strings of equal length, count the number of positions where the nucleotides differ (Hamming distance).

## Solution in Forth

```forth
\ Read two DNA strings and count point mutations
\ Assumes strings are of equal length

: read-dna-string ( -- addr len )
    \ Read a DNA string from input
    >r
